title: ObservationEvent
description: Canonical, immutable, normalized record of one model invocation. The single contract every analytics module consumes; storage sinks (JSONL, DB, etc.) serialize and yield this shape via the EventSource interface.

event_id.description: Stable unique id; deduplication key. Legacy records receive a deterministic content-hash id.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the invocation; ordering key for trends and sessions.

request_id.description: Underlying model request / round-trip id (ADK invocation-derived).

session_id.description: Session/conversation grouping. Legacy events use the sentinel 'unknown'.

conversation_id.description: Optional finer-grained conversation thread within a session.

parent_agent.description: Parent agent in the execution hierarchy (coordinator → sub-agent); null for a root. The agent execution tree is derived from these edges plus tool_name.

prompt_hash.description: Hash of resolved prompt text; groups identical prompts.

prompt_version.description: Tracked prompt version for regression detection.

tool_name.description: Tool invoked on this round-trip, if any.

output_tokens.description: Includes folded thinking/reasoning tokens (project tracking rule).

total_tokens.description: As recorded upstream; may exceed input+output.

cost.description: Decimal string, summed with decimal.js. '0' when the model is unpriced.

status.description: Outcome of the invocation; default 'success' for a tracked response.

attribution_status.description: Derived: complete when prompt+agent+session all present; missing when none; partial otherwise.

environment.description: Deployment environment (development | staging | production | ...). Optional; reserved for forward compatibility.

application_name.description: Name of the instrumented application. Optional.

application_version.description: Version of the instrumented application. Optional.

tenant_id.description: Tenant identifier for multi-tenant deployments. Optional.

tags.description: Free-form labels for filtering/grouping. Defaults to [].

correlation_id.description: Cross-system correlation id for distributed tracing. Optional.

metadata.description: Open key/value bag carried through uninterpreted (e.g. unpriced flag, sink-specific fields).

raw.description: Original unmodified source record, preserved for the JSON inspector and replay.
